_help.vps_host: user@host of your VPS, e.g. root@1.2.3.4
_help.ssh_key: absolute path to private key, e.g. ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
_help.supergroup_chat_id: negative int starting with -100... — captured in phase E
_help.daily_thread_id: small positive int — captured in phase E
_help.proactive_thread_id: small positive int — captured in phase E
_help.watcher_cadence: imessage in cron syntax (default '* * * * *' = every 1 min)
_help.gmail_cadence: gmail in cron syntax (default '*/30 * * * *' = every 30 min)
